headline: Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) Target Raised at Truist Following Q4 Performance and Sector Review
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 10 Large-Cap Stocks with Insider Buying in 2026. Airbnb, Inc. is one of the best stocks with insider buying. TheFly reported on March 26 that Truist Financial revised its rating on ABNB to Hold from Sell, setting a new price target of $129, up from $107. The upgrade […]
